tasks.subject: Task 0: Generic IP rate limiter + apply to 4 endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generalize loginRateLimiter → ipRateLimiter (parameterized window+max, type alias for login compat). Add 4 limiter fields on Handlers. Apply guards on /oauth/register (10/hour), /api/auth/device (20/15min), /api/auth/device/token (60/min), /api/auth/invite (10/15min). HTTP 429 + Retry-After on limit hit.

**Files:** internal/web/handlers.go (struct generalization, 4 fields, init, rateLimitResponse helper, invite guard), internal/web/device_auth.go (start + token guards), internal/web/oauth_provider.go (register guard), internal/web/ratelimiter_test.go (new — 5 subtests covering threshold, isolation, expiry, login backcompat).

**Verify:** `cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 ./internal/web/ -run "TestIPRateLimiter|TestLoginRateLimiter" -v && make test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/web/handlers.go", "internal/web/device_auth.go", "internal/web/oauth_provider.go", "internal/web/ratelimiter_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 ./internal/web/ -run \"TestIPRateLimiter|TestLoginRateLimiter\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ipRateLimiter parameterized", "loginRateLimiter type alias preserves backcompat", "4 new limiter fields on Handlers", "4 handlers return HTTP 429 + Retry-After at threshold", "per-IP isolation", "window expiry prunes", "make test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: DB file mode 0600 + process umask 0o077
tasks.description:
**Goal:** os.Chmod(path, 0o600) after integrity check in store.Open (best-effort, slog.Warn on failure). syscall.Umask(0o077) as first line of main(). Skips :memory:. Tests verify both paths.

**Files:** internal/store/db.go (chmod after integrity_check), internal/store/db_test.go (new tests), cmd/arc-relay/main.go (umask first line).

**Verify:** `cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 ./internal/store/ -run "TestOpen_Sets|TestOpen_Memory" -v && make test && make build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/store/db.go", "internal/store/db_test.go", "cmd/arc-relay/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 ./internal/store/ -run \"TestOpen_Sets|TestOpen_Memory\" -v && make test && make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Open chmods main .db to 0600 on success", "failure logs slog.Warn but does not fail boot", ":memory: skipped", "main() umask 0o077 first line", "tests verify both code paths", "make test + make build pass"]}
```
